ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Country code where the restaurant is located */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the restaurant is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the restaurant */,
  "locality" TEXT /* General locality of the restaurant */,
  "locality_verbose" TEXT /* Verbose locality of the restaurant, providing more detailed location information */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "cuisine_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of cuisine IDs offered by the restaurant */,
  "cost_for_two" REAL /* Average cost for two people */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for pricing */,
  "has_table_booking" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the restaurant offers table booking */,
  "has_online_delivery" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the restaurant offers online delivery */,
  "is_delivering_now" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the restaurant is currently delivering */,
  "switch_to_order_menu" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the restaurant has a switch to order menu */,
  "price_range" INTEGER /* Price range of the restaurant (1-4) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "rating_color" TEXT /* Color of the rating (e.g., Dark Green, Green) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review (e.g., Excellent, Very Good) */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes or reviews for the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the restaurant */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days of the week the restaurant operates */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the restaurant */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the restaurant's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Country code where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the cuisine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency against a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the exchange rate was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant where the booking was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "booking_time" TEXT /* Time of the booking */,
  "party_size" INTEGER /* Size of the party */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., Confirmed, Canceled) */,
  "booking_notes" TEXT /* Special notes or requests from the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant where the order was placed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Time of the order */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Placed, Delivered, Canceled) */,
  "delivery_notes" TEXT /* Special notes or instructions for the delivery */,
  "delivery_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for delivery */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual time of delivery */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who delivered the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the delivery was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the delivery was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "food_rating" REAL /* Rating for food quality */,
  "service_rating" REAL /* Rating for service quality */,
  "ambiance_rating" REAL /* Rating for the ambiance */,
  "value_rating" REAL /* Rating for value for money */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisine_restaurant_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine-restaurant mapping */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cuisine_restaurant_map_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cuisine_restaurant_map_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for pricing */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g., Appetizer, Main Course, Dessert) */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the menu item is vegetarian */,
  "is_vegan" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the menu item is vegan */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the menu item is gluten-free */,
  "is_kosher" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the menu item is kosher */,
  "is_halal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the menu item is halal */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens in the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)
